Name: Monolith Recorder
Author: Monolith
Description: Control Monolith game recorder from your Stream Deck.

Actions.Name: Save Replay
Actions.Tooltip: Save the current replay buffer to a clip file.

Actions.Name: Toggle Recording
Actions.Tooltip: Start recording if idle, stop recording if active.

Actions.Name: Pause / Resume
Actions.Tooltip: Pause or resume the current recording.
